steps.title: Collect the aged embryos from your juice plates
steps.instruction: Collect the aged embryos from your juice plates. Use brush and mesh filter.

steps.title: Dechorionate the embryos in the bleach for 00:05:00 to 00:10:00
steps.instruction: Dechorionate the embryos in the bleach for 00:05:00 to 00:10:00

steps.title: Wash the embryos in the distilled...
steps.instruction: Wash the embryos in the distilled water, check for the complete dechorionation under the microscope.

steps.title: Transfer the embryos to the 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the embryos to the 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube on ice, add 1 mL of PBTX, wait for embryos to precipitate, remove the supernatant, wash with PBTX 2 more times.

steps.title: Remove supernatant, add 1 ml of...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant, add 1 ml of HB buffer, transfer embryos in HB buffer to the small dounce homogenizer on ice. Leave for 5 minutes on ice.

steps.title: Dounce 20 times with the loose pestle
steps.instruction: Dounce 20 times with the loose pestle.

steps.title: Dounce 10 times with the tight pestle
steps.instruction: Dounce 10 times with the tight pestle.

steps.title: Prepare two layers of Miracloth
steps.instruction: Prepare two layers of Miracloth. They should cover a small glass funnel which should be compatible with 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube. The Miracloth layers should be rotated by 90 ° to each other's grain and placed into the funnel. Wash the cloth with the distilled water.

steps.title: Use a truncated (with scissors) 200...
steps.instruction: Use a truncated (with scissors) 200 μl tip on top of the 1 ml tip to collect the nuclei extract from the dounce homogenizer. Filter the lysate through the two Miracloth layers into the 1.5 ml tube. Squeeze the cloth gently to drain the lysate. It's okay to get a larger volume than 1 mL .

steps.title: Spin at 2000 g on 4...
steps.instruction: Spin at 2000 g on 4 °C for 00:05:00 to pellet the nuclei. Remove the murky supernatant.

steps.title: (Optional) Wash the nuclei in 1 mL of HB buffer
steps.instruction: (Optional) Wash the nuclei in 1 mL of HB buffer. Pellet them by spinning at 2000 g on 4 °C for 00:05:00 . It's possible to lose a lot of nuclei at this step.

steps.title: Remove the supernatant and add 500...
steps.instruction: Remove the supernatant and add 500 µL of freshly made PBTB buffer. Prepare a 1 ml syringe and a 19-G needle and a 22-G needle.

steps.title: Dissociate the nuclei by passing them...
steps.instruction: Dissociate the nuclei by passing them 8 times through a 19-G needle and then 8 times through a 22-G needle.

steps.title: IMPORTANT
steps.instruction: IMPORTANT!!! Before inserting the syringe into the tube, move the plunger a couple of times. Not doing so may result in a sudden aspiration of all the nuclei with the air creating bubbles which may disrupt the nuclei integrity.

steps.title: Cut the 1 ml pipette tip with scissors
steps.instruction: Cut the 1 ml pipette tip with scissors. Collect the nuclei with this tip. Wrap a 47 mm 20 μm Nylon Net Millipore filter securely around it and expel the nuclei solution into a new 1.5 ml tube.

steps.title: Count your nuclei with a counting...
steps.instruction: Count your nuclei with a counting chamber, taking 1-5 µL of your sample and mixing it with Trypan Blue solution.
